creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tomasz "CeDeROM" CEDRO from comment #8)
> 1. Yes I am running Xorg session with Enlightenment WM but behavior is exactly the same in bare terminal before I start X by hand. So the WM does not seem to interfere here.

It shouldn't work from bare terminal. Again, how are you starting graphics session? If it is the "startx" method, what do you have in ~/.xinitrc ?
